title: Procurement Auction System
desc: B2B platform for companies to auction surplus inventory or procurement needs. Features include reverse auctions, bulk bidding, and logistics integration.

title: Art & Collectibles Auction Platform
desc: Online auction house for art, antiques, and collectibles with authentication services, provenance tracking, and secure shipping coordination.

title: Freelance Job Bidding Marketplace
desc: Similar to Upwork but niche-focused (e.g., creative services). Includes profile management, portfolio display, milestone payments, and dispute resolution.

title: Construction Project Bidding Platform.
desc: Connects contractors with project owners. Features include project posting, contractor verification, bid submission, and project management tools.

title: Government Tender Management System
desc: A comprehensive system for government agencies to publish tenders and contractors to submit bids. Includes document management, evaluation tools, and compliance tracking.

title: Real Estate Bidding Platform
desc: A web platform where potential buyers can bid on properties in real-time auctions. Features include property listings, virtual tours, automated bidding, and secure payment processing.

title: Need some chairs
desc: We need 100 chairs for students of high quality.

title: Need of Some plants in the Garden
desc: Our institute is designing a garden in front of their building for which they need some plants. they can be any flowering plants and may beautify the scenery of the building.
